description: Style NoteWork the summer's high octane fashion trends with cobblerz's handmade leatherette sandals. This pair is just the right investment for a wardrobe update. Polish your look with this pair - these provide the perfect grounding for the season's brights. Heel: 4.5"Product DetailsBlack and grey textured, criss-crossing forefoot straps that loop to form ankle strapsDouble ankle straps with bucklingSoft footbed with the brand badge at the heelTough midsole at the forefoot and a tapering heelTPU footbed with a plastic heel patchMaterial and CareLeatheretteUse a leather brush and conditioner to clean this product
